post.description: Create the first team and admin user. Returns 409 if any team already exists.

Self-serve team creation. New teams start in 'pending' status and require
superadmin approval before members can log in.

schema.title: Response List Teams Api Superadmin Teams Get
Response List Users Api Superadmin Users Get
Response List Superadmin Messages Api Superadmin Messages Get
Response List Members Api Teams  Slug  Members Get
Response List Invitations Api Teams  Slug  Invitations Get

post.description: Recompute NP/TSS/IF/bests/intervals from stored streams using current athlete settings.

get.description: Return the list of provider names that have credentials configured on the server.
Return the list of provider names the current user has connected.
Return the OAuth authorization URL for the given provider.

Exchange OAuth code for tokens and persist the connection.

Strava / Wahoo redirect the user's browser here, so Bearer auth is not
available. We identify the user via the signed JWT in the ``state`` param.

post.description:
Trigger a full history import from the given provider in the background.

Syncs to all teams the user belongs to.
Fetch training zones (HR, power) and FTP from the provider and save to the athlete profile.

delete.description:
Revoke the provider token and remove the stored connection.

Pass ``delete_data=true`` to also permanently delete all activities that
were imported from this provider across all teams the user belongs to.

parameters.name: delete_data

schema.description: Also delete all activities imported from this provider
schema.title: Delete Data

parameters.description: Also delete all activities imported from this provider

schema.title: Response Get Fitness Api Metrics Fitness Get

get.description: Totals (count, active time, distance) for cycling activities in a period.

post.description: Fill missing DailyMetric rows using stored TSS. Called on dashboard load.

Recompute TSS for every processed activity using the athlete's current FTP/max_hr,
then rebuild CTL/ATL/TSB from the earliest activity forward.

Returns immediately (202); work happens in the background.

schema.title: Response List Goals Api Goals  Get

get.description:
Return the top-3 all-time best times for each standard distance,
ordered by (distance_m asc, rank asc).  Distances with no data are omitted.

By default only real (non-virtual) rides are included. Pass
include_virtual=true to include all ride types.

Return the top-3 best average power for each standard duration,
ordered by (duration_s asc, rank asc).  Durations with no data are omitted.
Pass ?days=90/180/365 to restrict to a rolling window; omit for all-time.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Restrict to bests from the past N days. Omit for all-time.
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Restrict to bests from the past N days. Omit for all-time.

get.description:
Estimate FTP from the athlete's power curve using two methods:

- Simple: 95% of the 20-minute (1200s) best power.
- Critical Power: linear work–time fit over the 2–20 minute bests (CP).

Both estimates use the rank-1 (single best) power per duration.  Pass
?days=90/180/365 to estimate from a rolling window; omit for all-time.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Estimate from bests in the past N days. Omit for all-time.
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Estimate from bests in the past N days. Omit for all-time.

schema.title: Response List Plans Api Plans  Get

get.description: Return the list of LLM base URLs the admin has allow-listed.

post.description:
Test the team's configured LLM connection. Admin-only.

Calls GET {base_url}/models on the team's saved LLM config and checks
whether the configured model appears in the response.
Proxy an OpenAI-compatible chat completion to the user's LLM endpoint.

get.description: Return the athlete profile of any team member (coach/admin only).
List activities for any team member (coach/admin only).

Serve an athlete's avatar image without requiring authentication.

The team_id + athlete_id pair acts as the opaque reference. No sensitive
data is exposed — only the image file itself is returned.

schema.title: Response List Export Formats Api Workouts Export Formats Get
Response List Workouts Api Workouts  Get

post.description:
Push a structured workout to Wahoo as a plan + scheduled workout pair.

Creates (or updates, by ``external_id``) a plan in the athlete's Wahoo
library and a workout scheduled within the today→+6 day visibility window so
it appears under "Planned Workouts" on ELEMNT / RIVAL devices.
